events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the fault is a cold shaft alignment performed without applying thermal growth offsets for hot service — a compliance failure under API 686 that risks coupling/bearing/seal degradation as the machine reaches operating temperature. Marked `fail`, `high` risk, with corrective actions (recalculate thermal growth targets, perform hot check, realign, monitor vibration/bearing temps).
